name: Cranberry-Orange Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup (1/2 stick) butter or margarine, softened
1/3 cup Orange flavor liqueur or Orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a shallow 2 1/2 quart casserole dish.
Cut the bread diagonally into 1/2 inch thick slices. Lightly butter one side of each bread slice.
Arrange the bread, butter side up, in the prepared casserole dish, overlapping slices slightly.
2. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, half-and-half, liqueur (or orange juice), and 1/2 cup sugar until well combined.
Gradually pour the egg mixture over the bread slices in the casserole dish.
Let stand for at least 20 minutes (or cover and refrigerate the mixture for up to 2 hours).
Gently press the bread into the egg mixture with a fork.
Sprinkle the bread mixture with cranberries, then with the remaining 1/4 cup sugar.
3. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the pudding is browned and puffy and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
